## Summary

Describe what this PR changes and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] Translation update

## Validation

- [ ] I verified the app still runs.
- [ ] I ran static checks and there are no new errors.
- [ ] I did not change behavior unintentionally.

## Translation Checklist (if applicable)

- [ ] I updated `locales.json` only by editing values or adding full key coverage.
- [ ] I did not remove existing locale keys by mistake.
- [ ] Placeholder tokens are preserved exactly (e.g. `{}`, `{:.1f}`).
- [ ] I ran `python scripts/check_locales.py` successfully.
- [ ] If README translation pages changed, language links are updated in:
  - [ ] `README.md`
  - [ ] `README.zh-CN.md`
  - [ ] `README.ja.md`

## Legal and Content Confirmation

- [ ] I confirm this PR does not add unauthorized copyrighted songs/MIDI assets.
- [ ] I understand this repository is licensed under AGPL-3.0-or-later.

## Additional Notes

Add anything reviewers should know.
